title: barleria longipedunculata
intro: Barleria longipedunculata, also known as the 'Kali Nelli' or 'Kali Nelamari', is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Its leaves and roots are used in herbal preparations, which are believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, providing several health benefits including wound healing, pain relief, and antioxidant activity. The plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are consumed orally or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
